title: Make recent activity repository pills filter
summary: Changed the Recent activity repository pills from navigation links into in-place filters. Selecting a repository now keeps users on the Activity page, updates the active pill state, and filters the visible activity rows before the six-row limit is applied.
userVisibleChange: The Recent activity repository pills now behave as filters instead of taking users to repository pages. Clicking chaintalk, eve, or All repositories keeps the current page in place and updates the activity list.

risks.title: Repository attribution still depends on available snapshot detail metadata
risks.mitigation: The filter reuses the same repoForEvolution attribution path already used to label rows, keeping filter and row labels consistent.

timeline.title: Converted pills to filter buttons
timeline.summary: Replaced router Links with aria-pressed buttons backed by local activeRepo state.

timeline.title: Filtered recent activity rows in place
timeline.summary: Rows are now filtered by repository before slicing to six visible entries.

timeline.title: Verified routing and filtering behavior
timeline.summary: Confirmed with Playwright that repo pill clicks do not navigate away and rows match the selected repository.

decisions.title: Use buttons for repository pills
decisions.rationale: The pills are controls for the current activity list, not navigation to repository detail pages.

decisions.title: Filter before truncating recent rows
decisions.rationale: Filtering before the six-row limit ensures selecting a repository can surface that repository's recent activity even if it was below the initial mixed list.

decisions.title: Preserve snapshot row navigation
decisions.rationale: Only the repository pills changed behavior; clicking an activity row should still open the snapshot detail.

validation.output: Built the UI from an isolated clean worktree with only the filter-pill patch applied, then copied the generated embedded assets back.
Clicking the eve pill kept pathname at / and showed only eve rows; clicking the chaintalk pill kept pathname at / and showed only chaintalk rows.
